repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.embedded: FreeRTOS task priorities, interrupt service routine latency, memory-mapped peripheral register access, watchdog timer, low-power sleep modes, and hard real-time deadlines on an MCU
build a React dashboard with CSS animations and a REST API

retrieval_query: embedded firmware rtos freertos microcontroller mcu bare metal interrupt isr register map watchdog low power real-time deadline flash ram constraint

validation_smoke.name: code.embedded L3 validation smoke
signals: worst-case ISR latency measured under load (logic analyzer / GPIO toggle)
RTOS task deadlines met under stress (no priority inversion / missed deadline trace)
stack high-water mark leaves headroom on every task
flash/RAM map fits with margin (linker map report)
watchdog kicks verified and recovery path tested

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.embedded diagnosis smoke
signals: long or blocking work inside an ISR
heap allocation on a real-time path
shared variable accessed from ISR and task without volatile/critical section
watchdog disabled or its period widened to mask a hang
register written without reading the datasheet's required sequence
